form.tagsHelp: Only scan sites with at least one of the selected tags (leave empty to scan all)

settings.title: Username Search Settings
settings.description: Configure how Maigret scans sites when searching for a username.
settings.maxConcurrencyHelp: Maximum number of sites checked in parallel
settings.topSitesCountHelp: Number of top-ranked sites to scan (0 = all sites)
settings.proxyUrlHelp: Optional proxy used for site checks (e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:9050)
settings.autoUpdateDbDescription: Periodically check for an updated Maigret site database
settings.dbStatusBundled: {{count}} sites (bundled database, never checked for updates)
settings.maigretUpdateRequiresRebuild: maigret is installed at image-build time - installing a newer version requires rebuilding the backend container, this only checks what's available
settings.saDescription: Configure the social-analyzer additional search source.
settings.saTimeoutSecondsHelp: social-analyzer's own request throttling, not a request timeout
settings.saVersionNeverChecked: PyPI has not been checked for a newer version yet
settings.saUpdateRequiresRebuild: social-analyzer's site data ships inside the pip package - installing a newer version requires rebuilding the backend container, this only checks what's available
